text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation as I enter this bright, modern space. The smooth glass doors and crisp white walls are almost clinical, yet the vivid colors and bold designs pulling my gaze inward generate a stirring curiosity. In the second room, the visually arresting wall and prominent R+D, signaling research and development, ignite thoughts about progress, innovation, and our relationship with technology. I am aware of my own questions about the pace of change and my place within this evolving narrative.
